data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Cost allocation per department', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the use case mentions that usage costs are billed to each department monthly, there are no specific details or evidence demonstrating how this cost allocation is implemented or validated in the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the implementation of cost allocation per department.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API validation for cost allocation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the cost allocation per department.
